economic_notes: Beaver Air Services LP (Missinippi Airways) 100% owned, revenues $14.75M, net income $1.9M. Keewatin Railway Co. Ltd. 44% equity ownership, revenues $6M, net loss $232K. Missinippi Construction Co. Ltd. consolidated. Community Bingo and Gaming Operations. Growcer Container Farm project noted in deferred revenue.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2021 but audit report signed August 21, 2023 — significant delay. Net debt position of $3,763,802. Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Beaver Air Services LP (100%) and Keewatin Railway Co. Ltd. (44%). Seven entities fully consolidated including Housing Authority, Health Authority, Education Authority, Crisis Centre, Daycare, Missinippi Construction, and unincorporated departments. Large deferred revenue balance of $16.36M at year end vs $5.18M prior year, resulting in a net deficit of $2.74M. Long-term investments in GBEs total $11.4M. No schedule of remuneration provided. Construction in progress of $1.44M not included in tangible capital assets net book value. Total ISC funding per agreement was $38,483,736 split between ISC ($31,117,324) and Health Canada ($7,366,412).
